function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"summary": "Generated BDD scenarios for scenario-execution", "deliverable": {"scenarios": [{"given": "the API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to /healthz", "then": ["a 200 status code is returned", "the response Content-Type header is application/json", "the response body contains a JSON object with a 'status' field equal to 'ok'"], "title": "A GET request is sent to /healthz"}, {"given": "the monitoring system is configured and running", "when": "the monitoring scrape cycle executes", "then": ["the /healthz endpoint is included in the list of scrape targets", "the scrape interval for /healthz is 30 seconds or less", "a failed health check triggers an alert after two consecutive failures"], "title": "The monitoring scrape cycle executes"}]}}
